chapter_title.en: The meaning of haqila, muzabana, ‘araya, mukhabarat, mukhadhara, munabadha, mulamasa, the selling of pebble and other things that were declared forbidden

text: ونهى صلى الله عليه وآله عن الملاقيح والمضامين، فالملاقيح ما في البطون وهي الأجنة والواحدة منها " ملقوحة " وأما المضامين فمما في أصلاب الفحول وكانوا يبيعون الجنين في بطن الناقة وما يضرب الفحل في عامه أو في أعوام.

en.basel-kadem: He, Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Family, also forbade malaqeeh [1] and madhameen [2]. Malaqeeh are those in bellies, and they are fetuses, and a singular is malqouha. As for madhameen, they are those in the spines of males. They used to sell the fetus that is in the belly of a female camel, and what a male ejaculates within a year or several years.
